summary: Architecture Profile boundaries were split so src/architecture/profile.ts only resolves, lists, and writes profiles; builtin profile content lives in src/architecture/builtin-profiles.ts; objective descriptor, normalization, and validation live in src/architecture/profile-model.ts; shared technical baseline shape helpers live in src/architecture/technical-baseline.ts and are reused by baseline validation. Architecture profiles, doctor/status, focused CLI tests, architecture tests, typecheck, and diff checks passed.

sources.label: opennori-self-architecture-profile-boundary
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

reviewability: Inspect the listed architecture files to confirm content, model validation, shared technical baseline helpers, and storage facade are separate. Rerun the listed focused verification commands.
limitations: This proves the Architecture Profile boundary split and objective validation reuse for this slice. It does not prove subjective architecture quality for every future project profile; that remains packaged Skill and user review.
